subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy numerous letters, like the spring rain, have showered down divine meanings and like unto gems [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه های متعدد شما چون ابر بهار فیض معانی و چون جوهر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
